title: Little Squad Modpack
description: Little Squad Origins 2.0 - Esquadrão Pequeno Origens 2.0
body:
# Little Squad Origins 2.0

A modpack focused on a vanilla but modified experience, taking inspiration from the QSMP server modpack, but adding data-packs in addition to mods.
The modpack has mods focusing on decoration, adventure, world generation, and some data-packs focusing on vanilla quality of life.

The modpack also focuses on being optimized and not using so many mods that require processing, being an adventure modpack, decoration and optimized for servers with people who have less powerful computers.


Have fun!
